"'''Waterboy'''" was the callsign of a young, petite, female [[Ensign/Legends|ensign]] in the [[Praesitlyn Defense Force]]. She was a friend of [[V-19 Torrent starfighter/Legends|T-19 starfighter]] pilots [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Erk H'Arman]] and [[Ensign/Legends|Ensign]] [[Pleth Strom]]. The control ship she was aboard was shot down by [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederate]] forces, and she was assumed not to have survived.

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Trial]]'' {{1st}} {{Ho}}
